title: Cylindrolobus fimbrilobus
taxonomy: Cylindrolobus fimbrilobus is classified within the phylum Ascomycota, specifically belonging to the class Leotiomycetes. This classification places it in the division Pezizomycotina, which is a large and diverse group of fungi. Within the class Leotiomycetes, Cylindrolobus fimbrilobus is further grouped into the order Helotiales. This order is characterized by its members being primarily saprotrophic or parasitic fungi. The family and genus classification for Cylindrolobus fimbrilobus may require further research for more specific information.
